content:
Feeling the peace while working at the mitre10 cafe. I think it's because I finally got information about my contract. That's a weight I have been holding for a while... Glad the burden has been released. Well, still no contract but getting some concrete details is very reassuring. 
I really want to work on my mind movie.. still trying to figure out what I want in the long term but I'm keen to build something right now. We can always iterate!
